name: gmail-plugin
description: Interact with Gmail for unread checks and composing messages using real Gmail APIs
author: Kari Team

actions.name: check_unread_emails
actions.description: Check for unread emails in the user's Gmail inbox.

max_results.description: Maximum number of unread emails to retrieve (default: 5)

actions.name: compose_email
actions.description: Compose and send an email using the user's Gmail account.

actions.name: list_labels
actions.description: List all labels in the user's Gmail account.

actions.name: get_email_details
actions.description: Get details of a specific email by its ID.

email_id.description: The ID of the email to retrieve details for

actions.name: delete_email
actions.description: Delete a specific email by its ID.

email_id.description: The ID of the email to delete

actions.name: mark_email_as_read
actions.description: Mark a specific email as read by its ID.

email_id.description: The ID of the email to mark as read

actions.name: mark_email_as_unread
actions.description: Mark a specific email as unread by its ID.

email_id.description: The ID of the email to mark as unread

actions.name: reply_to_email
actions.description: Reply to a specific email by its ID.

email_id.description: The ID of the email to reply to

body.description: Body content of the reply email

actions.name: forward_email
actions.description: Forward a specific email by its ID.

email_id.description: The ID of the email to forward

to.description: Recipient email address for the forwarded email

actions.name: search_emails
actions.description: Search for emails in the user's Gmail account using a query string.

actions.name: get_email_attachments
actions.description: Get attachments of a specific email by its ID.

email_id.description: The ID of the email to retrieve attachments for

actions.name: download_attachment
actions.description: Download a specific attachment by its ID.

attachment_id.description: The ID of the attachment to download

actions.name: send_email_with_attachment
actions.description: Compose and send an email with an attachment using the user's Gmail account.

attachment_path.description: File path of the attachment to include in the email

actions.name: list_drafts
actions.description: List all draft emails in the user's Gmail account.

actions.name: create_draft
actions.description: Create a draft email in the user's Gmail account.

actions.name: send_draft
actions.description: Send a specific draft email by its ID.

draft_id.description: The ID of the draft email to send

actions.name: delete_draft
actions.description: Delete a specific draft email by its ID.

draft_id.description: The ID of the draft email to delete

actions.name: get_draft_details
actions.description: Get details of a specific draft email by its ID.

draft_id.description: The ID of the draft email to retrieve details for

actions.name: list_threads
actions.description: List all email threads in the user's Gmail account.

actions.name: get_thread_details
actions.description: Get details of a specific email thread by its ID.

thread_id.description: The ID of the email thread to retrieve details for
